title: rhamnus esquirolii
intro: Rhamnus esquirolii, also known as the Chinese frangue or Emetic buckthorn, is a plant species in the family Rhamnaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, used in traditional medicine for its emetic and purgative properties. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to induce vomiting and relieve digestive issues, and its extracts have been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Rhamnus esquirolii is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of dyspepsia.
